This algorithms as been developed in the frame of the BiCOME project founded by ESA. Simon Oiry was a PhD Student and Bede Davies a post doc. 
This UI has been developed by Simon Oiry for the ICE CREAMS algorithm developed by Bede Davies.

Link toward the algorithm : https://github.com/BedeFfinian/ICE_CREAMS

Simon : 
- Website : https://oirysimon.com
- github : https://github.com/SigOiry
- researchgate : www.researchgate.net/profile/Simon-Oiry

Bede : 
- Website : https://bedeffinianrowedavies.com
- GitHub : https://github.com/BedeFfinian
- researchGate : www.researchgate.net/profile/Bede-Davies-2
